next_steps: Measure thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, T3)
Send serum and CSF for autoimmune encephalitis panel (specifically anti-NMDA receptor antibodies)
Send urine for porphobilinogen (PBG) and delta-aminolevulinic acid (ALA) testing
Maintain hemodynamic stability and supportive care

differential_diagnoses: Hashimoto encephalopathy (steroid-responsive encephalopathy associated with autoimmune thyroiditis)
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, T3) and anti-thyroid peroxidase/anti-thyroglobulin antibodies
Initiate continuous EEG monitoring to rule out non-convulsive status epilepticus
Send serum and CSF for autoimmune encephalitis panel including NMDAR and LGI1 antibodies
Perform lumbar puncture for detailed CSF analysis (including autoimmune markers, cytology, and protein electrophoresis)
Check serum prolactin and CK levels to further evaluate the clinical seizure event
Screen urine for porphobilinogen (PBG) and delta-aminolevulinic acid (ALA)
Maintain strict seizure precautions and supportive hemodynamic management
